query:
-- Full audit of all ChannelHaus services
SELECT 
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  CASE WHEN s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue THEN 'COST=REVENUE (0% margin)' ELSE 'OK' END as issue,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY issue DESC, s.customerName;

SELECT 
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  CASE WHEN s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue THEN 'COST=REVENUE (0% margin)' ELSE 'OK' END as issue,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY issue DESC, s.customerName;
